textByHash.128edba9d60717f6f9cbc9e4d117155ab99a6f89: ...Urgh! Wh... what happened? ...Why do I feel so awful?
textByHash.05900865d35c5a015b97b0c0dc6a84a94069046e: Wh... what happened? The last thing I remember was confronting that Tanglefoot with the aid of the Godfather.
textByHash.635d6f0f02aa3f6e5873a0b7a8eef8814ad3a16f: Yes, that's what I said... oh, hello . Please excuse me for not having noticed you earlier, I'm not feeling quite myself. Why did you shout about the Godfather?
textByHash.898dbe86f7c311a65c755169704cfff91e9c13bb: That's absurd, why would the Godfather want to hurt me?
textByHash.bd6ac031fa714d53c65e040742199f05f2312d07: But that's the point, I didn't fight the Tanglefoot. We had only just entered its lair and sensing the danger to itself, the Tanglefoot fled down a passage, then... blackness!
textByHash.c1dba29fb5ebcc7a09647181a13577cd886731e1: He shan't get away with this, how do I get back to Zanaris? The Godfather shall answer for his crimes!
textByHash.2a41fcb036586ccd3637003c678802bd061da5a3: There is wisdom in what you say. I shall ponder your words before I act rashly. As for you, , how can I reward you? You have done the fairy people a great favour that shall not be forgotten. I'm afraid
textByHash.e8ed7e8aab8b4c090a612370869ada8af5d2260d: you find us in trying times, but please accept this magic lamp as a sign of our thanks.
textByHash.77caea26f4d407dd164ccbd7f33d2dbbf4635503: That's alright, come back and get it when you can.
textByHash.bb457af9c60b8931f317782d877c8ec7c24602bd: Clearly you come from a plane dependent on sunlight. Down here, the plants grow in the aura of faerie.
textByHash.d7b99c6752ffffad219ea15d49a18f4cf21d7a97: Zanaris is a meeting point of cultures. Those from many worlds converge here to exchange knowledge and goods.
textByHash.bcac72e14e2409acffef75736e6bd6988ca00799: Not yet, , but it looks like we'll need to ask you for your help again, I'm afraid. I'll be able to tell you more once we have finished making our battle plans.
textByHash.226216ca5b12764e79d4a1d7dc56a99eeb120192: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
textByHash.10ba7455f73a9c7bee6e75fb4b7bd4a4f48aeca5: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.
